description: Style Note High-top styling on the classic suede shoe, this woodland ankle boot is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with lugs, plush textured upper, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorialist dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt. Product Details Nubuk upper with strategically placed overlays, central lace ups, padded tongue with branding, pull loop at the heel, padded insole for in-step comfort, , dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heel, outsole reinforced onto the upper on the toe box and heel collar for maximum comfort, outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe guard Material and Care Nubuk, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
